characters.name: Blip Hoopla
characters.description: Blip HooplaRelativesDon Hoopla(father)Loop Hoopla'(brother)AffiliationDasher(Friend)Physical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorGreen Loop Hoopla'(brother) Blip Hoopla is a character from Hasbro Eone's cartoon called Ricky Zoom. Blip is Loop's older brother and he is a 13 year old delivery bike. He mainly delivers pizza but in some episodes, he delivers other things. For example, in Scootio Changes Lanes, he is delivering a big ice cube. Sometimes Blip gets into bad luck and he feels like the whole world is against him.

characters.description: Don HooplaRelativesLoop(son)Blip Hoopla(son)Physical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorTeal Blip Hoopla(son) Loop’s dad is Wheelford’s resident mail carrier who takes great pride in making sure every parcel is delivered safely to its rightful owner. A skilled off-road bike like Loop, he delivers the mail come rain, shine, or snow!

characters.name: Hank and Helen Zoom
characters.description: Hank and Helen Zoomare recurring characters in Hasbro's preschool cartoonRicky Zoom. They areRicky's parents. Hank and Helen Zoom are Wheelford’s leading rescue bikes. Daring and brave, they are always the first to respond to any emergency in the town. Together they form an impressive team when they’re speeding through town, sirens a-blazing. Ricky’s seen them make intrepid leaps across canyons to help bikes in peril and watched them race to the scene of a fire while everybody else was running away. The entire town of Wheelford marvels at their courage. Reve

characters.name: Loop
characters.description: LoopRelativesDon Hoopla(father)Blip Hoopla(brother)Physical descriptionGenderMaleLoopis one of the main characters in Hasbro's preschool cartoonRicky Zoom. He is voiced by Bradley Bissett Blip Hoopla(brother) Dirt bike Loop just wants to have fun – by jumping ramps, doing loop-de-loops and trying crazy new stunts powered by his Boosters. Wide-eyed and adventurous, Loop has a love for life and a happy-go-lucky attitude. He always wants the best out of every situation but, despite his best intentions, he is easily distracted. Loop is so busy performing tricks that he doesn’t always think about what he’s doing, and his acrobatics sometimes turns into slapstick silliness.

characters.name: Maxwell
characters.description: MaxwellPhysical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrownMaxwell is a character from Hasbro Eone's cartoon called Ricky Zoom. Maxwell runs the town's garage. At the garage, he repairs the bikes that need fixing. He also leads the Ramp Camp which is a camp that the Bike Buddies are in.

characters.name: Officer Bunker
characters.description: Officer BunkerRelativesBuster Bunker(grandson)Physical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrown Wheelford’s police bike, Officer Bunker takes his duties very seriously indeed! He has committed each and every last rule of the Wheelford Highway Code to heart and patrols its highways and byways ensuring that bikes, both young and old, abide by the rules to ensure the safety of the townsfolk. But behind his strict exterior lies a heart of gold. He’s really just a big softy who particularly loves the Bike Buddies, seeing a lot of himself as a young bike in them. He’d love to impart the lessons he’s learned since he took off his training wheels — if only the buddies would stay still long enough to listen!

characters.name: Ricky
characters.description: Rickyis the main character of Hasbro's preschool cartoonRicky Zoom. Ricky is a little red rescue bike who loves to go fast! A loyal friend and natural leader, Ricky is the confident head of the Bike Buddies and together they love to race around the sports race and try new stunts at the Adventure Park. However, Ricky is still a little bike learning to stand on his own two wheels and he often dives headlong into rescue situations, overestimating his abilities. Despite having cool rescue resources such as his Visor and Grappling hook, he realises he still has a lot to learn.

characters.name: Scootio
characters.description: ScootioRelativesFred Whizzbang(father)Whoopie Whizzbang(mother)Physical descriptionGenderFemaleEye colorBlueScootiois one of the main characters in Hasbro's preschool cartoon Ricky Zoom. She is voiced by Twinkle Jaiswal Whoopie Whizzbang(mother) Scooter Scootio, the lead girl bike, is bright, brainy and never afraid to speak her mind! A self-professed “gadget guru”, her technical genius matches her can-do attitude and she loves nothing better than using her tech-based gadgets such as her tablet, ZoomCam, and robotic Scootbops to try to find the solution to any puzzles or dilemmas the gang might face.

characters.name: Steel Awesome
characters.description: Steel AwesomePhysical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBlue Movie star, comic-book hero and huge celebrity, stunt bike Steel Awesome has packs of adoring fans… including himself! Bold, brave and handsome (and doesn’t he know it!), he loves doing his own extravagant movie stunts. Though he can be who absurdly over-the-top, Steel is the epitome of what an action bike can be, and Ricky idolises him for it. He dreams of meeting his hero one day and becoming his sidekick, Vroom Boy, so that Steel will teach him all he knows about being a daring and courageous bike.

characters.name: Toot
characters.description: TootRelativesHank Zoom (father)Helen Zoom (mother)Ricky Zoom (brother)Dasher Zoom(cousin)Physical descriptionGenderFemaleEye colorGreenTootis a recurring character in Hasbro's preschool cartoonRicky Zoom. She is voiced by Miranda Pointer in Season 1 and Heidi Williams in Seasons 2 and 3. Helen Zoom (mother)Ricky Zoom (brother)Dasher Zoom(cousin) Sweet yet sassy, Toot is always eager to get in on some fun with the Bike Buddies whenever she can – though her habit of recounting embarrassing tales and titbits about Ricky means that although he adores her, he can be resistant to having her around! They think of her rather like an extra set of wheels: nice to have around when you need them, but whoever heard of a bike with four wheels?! However, though smaller than the other buddies, Toot is impossible to ignore – and often ends up stealing the show!
